summary: Iteration 41: Tested Video Designer v6.1 features (title, filming guide, 3 packages 69/129/199 EUR, 10 styles, default height 2.7m), About page dark theme, Profile page, PUT /api/auth/profile endpoint. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.

issues: Landing page pricing section shows 69/129/220 EUR while Video Designer page shows 69/129/199 EUR. This may be intentional (different products) but should be verified.

passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (12/12 pytest tests passed) ===
✅ Filming guide 'КАК ДА СНИМАШ ПРАВИЛНО' collapsible section
✅ 5 steps in filming guide (ЦЕНТЪРА, БАВНО, лампи, ХОРИЗОНТАЛНО, телефон)
✅ Switching back to 69 EUR reduces to 1 room
✅ Drag&Drop, Галерия, Камера badges in upload area
✅ 10 styles in dropdown (Модерен, Минималист, Класически, Бохо, Хай-тек, Индустриален, Скандинавски, Лофт, Неокласически, Арт Деко)
✅ Generate button shows 'ГЕНЕРИРАНЕ — XX EUR' with correct package price
✅ Auth gate shown for unauthenticated users
✅ Profile page loads for logged-in users
Note: Landing page pricing differs from Video Designer packages (199 vs 220 for largest package)
critical_code_review_comments: All requested v6.1 features implemented correctly:
1. Video Designer title 'TEMADOM 360° VIDEO 3D v6.1' - verified
3. Three packages (69/129/199 EUR) - verified in AIDesignerPage.jsx
4. Package auto-expansion (2 rooms for 129, 3 rooms for 199) - verified
5. Video upload: 60 seconds max, 50MB limit - verified
9. Profile page with edit functionality - verified
10. PUT /api/auth/profile endpoint - verified (updates name, city, website, description)
Minor observation: Landing page pricing section shows 220 EUR for 4-5 rooms while Video Designer shows 199 EUR for Апартамент. These may be different products but worth noting.
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test account profile@temadom.bg
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 tested Video Designer v6.1 features. Key test IDs: ia-designer-page, guide-toggle, guide-content, pkg-1/2/3, room-tab-{n}, video-drop-0, dim-height-0, style-0, generate-btn, about-page, about-register-btn, about-calculator-btn, profile-page, profile-name, edit-profile-btn, save-profile-btn, profile-input-name/city/website/desc, logout-btn, pricing-section, pricing-card-0/1/2. Backend accepts 60s videos (not 15s). Login: profile@temadom.bg / Test123!
